ddls:
CREATE TABLE "activities" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity */,
  "activity_name" TEXT /* Name of the activity */,
  "activity_description" TEXT /* Description of the activity */,
  "activity_fee_description" TEXT /* Description of the fee associated with the activity */,
  "activity_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the activity in minutes */,
  "activity_difficulty_level" TEXT /* Difficulty level of the activity (e.g., easy, medium, hard) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "entities" (
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each entity */,
  "entity_name" TEXT /* Name of the entity */,
  "entity_type" TEXT /* Type of entity (e.g., RecArea, Campsite, Facility) */,
  "entity_address" TEXT /* Address of the entity */,
  "entity_capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum capacity of the entity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("entity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activity_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the activity being assigned */,
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the entity the activity is assigned to */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date the activity was assigned */,
  "assignment_status" TEXT /* Status of the assignment (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_assignments_entity_id FOREIGN KEY ("entity_id") REFERENCES entities ("entity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_assignments_activity_id FOREIGN KEY ("activity_id") REFERENCES activities ("activity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activity_usage" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each usage event */,
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the activity being used */,
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the entity where the activity took place */,
  "usage_date" TEXT /* Date the activity was used */,
  "participant_count" INTEGER /* Number of participants in the activity */,
  "revenue_generated" REAL /* Revenue generated from the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_usage_entity_id FOREIGN KEY ("entity_id") REFERENCES entities ("entity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_usage_activity_id FOREIGN KEY ("activity_id") REFERENCES activities ("activity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "revenue" (
  "revenue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each revenue event */,
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the activity generating revenue */,
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the entity where the revenue was generated */,
  "revenue_date" TEXT /* Date the revenue was generated */,
  "revenue_amount" REAL /* Amount of revenue generated */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., cash, card, online) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("revenue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_revenue_activity_id FOREIGN KEY ("activity_id") REFERENCES activities ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_revenue_entity_id FOREIGN KEY ("entity_id") REFERENCES entities ("entity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., park ranger, administrator, public) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "permission_description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_permissions" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id", "permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)
